title: Massachusetts Commission Against Discrimination (MCAD) — Agency Landing Page (multi-subpage bundle)
description: Scrape of the MCAD landing page. MCAD enforces anti-discrimination law under M.G.L. c.151B in employment, housing, public accommodations, and more — covering complaint filing, case process, mediation/conciliation (ADR), public hearings, training, model policies, and annual reports. MCAD charges are auto-dual-filed with the federal EEOC where federal law also applies.
notes: CONSUMPTION HAZARD: very large file (~1.06 MB / ~1,061,722 bytes) — a single Firecrawl scrape bundling many MCAD subpages. c.151B complaint deadline is 300 days from the discriminatory act (180 if no parallel federal claim). A new online complaint portal was announced as forthcoming (March 2026 notice).
